blended.narrative: Montana Snowbowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,710 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
